top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs Sees Yen at 165 per Dollar in 12 Months
top_signals.summary: Kamakshya Trivedi, head of global FX and interest rates at Goldman Sachs, discusses the firm's forecast for the yen which it has revised to 165 per dollar in a year’s time from 155. "I think the undervaluation that you're seeing on the yen is really historic," Trivedi tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EasyJet shares soar 10% as budget airline agrees $7.3 billion Castlelake takeover
top_signals.summary: EasyJet shares surged in early dealmaking Monday after it agreed in principle to takeover bid from Castlelake.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
